description_long: This object is a handheld game controller, featuring a predominantly pink body with black accents. It has two analog sticks, a central touchpad, and a set of directional and action buttons, including the iconic triangle, circle, cross, and square symbols. The controller also includes shoulder buttons and triggers on the top edge, as well as a central button and smaller function buttons. The ergonomic design is contoured for comfortable grip, with textured areas for thumb and finger placement. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with rubberized grips for enhanced handling. This type of controller is commonly used for video game consoles and is designed for interactive entertainment in home or urban recreational settings.
description: A pink and black ergonomic game controller with dual analog sticks, a touchpad, and iconic action buttons. Designed for comfortable handheld use and interactive gaming.
description_view_0: The left side of the controller is visible, highlighting the directional pad, left analog stick, and shoulder buttons.
description_view_1: The rear and left grip are shown, emphasizing the smooth contours and the underside of the controller.
description_view_2: The front face is visible, displaying the action buttons, right analog stick, and central touchpad.
description_view_3: The right side and top are shown, with a clear view of the action buttons, right grip, and shoulder buttons.
